case_title: DCFS TRUST VS. JASON A DINGLE et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT DINGLE, JASON A DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-16-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST SERVED OCT-10-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DINGLE, JASON A
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $370.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DINGLE, JASON A
DECLARATION OF MEREDITH MCVEY RE: EVID CODE 1521 & 1553 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST
DECLARATION OF MEREDITH MCVEY RE: CCP 585(D) & 1033 - IN SUPPOORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT DINGLE, JASON A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-02-2009 CONTINUED TO FEB-03-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DINGLE, JASON A $20,683.88 PRINCIPAL, $2,068.39 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,870.05 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,992.32, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-03-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST
